violations.text: Corn packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per person in charge, labels will be made. Establishment must make labels and send proof of correction to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The hot hold unit located in the front counter area was not in good repair. Sliding door missing. No food was observed stored in the hot hold unit at time of inspection. Per person in charge, the part for the hot hold unit has been ordered and is supposed to be delivered sometime this week. Person in charge provided inspector with a receipt of purchase at time of inspection. Please provide inspector proof of repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
